creator: dmitryluhtionov@gmail.com
text:
iwlwifi do not work after upgrade to 13-STABLE

dmesg:

iwlwifi0: <iwlwifi> mem 0xa1100000-0xa1103fff at device 0.0 on pci2
iwlwifi0: successfully loaded firmware image 'iwlwifi-cc-a0-73.ucode'
iwlwifi0: api flags index 2 larger than supported by driver
iwlwifi0: TLV_FW_FSEQ_VERSION: FSEQ Version: 89.3.35.37
iwlwifi0: loaded firmware version 73.35c0a2c6.0 cc-a0-73.ucode op_mode iwlmvm
iwlwifi0: Detected Intel(R) Wi-Fi 6 AX200 160MHz, REV=0x340
iwlwifi0: Detected RF HR B3, rfid=0x10a100
iwlwifi0: base HW address: dc:41:a9:e6:7e:54
wlan0: Ethernet address: dc:41:a9:e6:7e:54

ifconfig:

wlan0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
	ether dc:41:a9:e6:7e:54
	groups: wlan
	ssid "" channel 1 (2412 MHz 11g)
	regdomain FCC country US authmode WPA1+WPA2/802.11i privacy MIXED
	deftxkey UNDEF txpower 30 bmiss 7 scanvalid 60 protmode CTS wme
	roaming MANUAL bintval 0
	parent interface: iwlwifi0
	media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet autoselect (autoselect)
	status: no carrier
	nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>



pciconf:

iwlwifi0@pci0:2:0:0:	class=0x028000 rev=0x1a hdr=0x00 vendor=0x8086 device=0x2723 subvendor=0x8086 subdevice=0x0084
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'Wi-Fi 6 AX200'
    class      = network
    cap 01[c8] = powerspec 3  supports D0 D3  current D0
    cap 05[d0] = MSI supports 1 message, 64 bit 
    cap 10[40] = PCI-Express 2 endpoint max data 128(128) FLR RO NS
                 max read 128
                 link x1(x1) speed 5.0(5.0) ASPM L1(L1) ClockPM enabled
    cap 11[80] = MSI-X supports 16 messages, enabled
                 Table in map 0x10[0x2000], PBA in map 0x10[0x3000]
    ecap 0001[100] = AER 1 0 fatal 0 non-fatal 0 corrected
    ecap 0018[14c] = LTR 1
    ecap 001e[154] = L1 PM Substates 1


trying to connect to isecure network "Altair_free" without password:

Jan  9 18:05:25 acer wpa_supplicant[258]: wlan0: CTRL-EVENT-DSCP-POLICY clear_all
Jan  9 18:05:25 acer syslogd: last message repeated 1 times
Jan  9 18:05:25 acer wpa_supplicant[258]: wlan0: CTRL-EVENT-TERMINATING 
Jan  9 18:05:25 acer kernel: iwlwifi0: iwl_trans_send_cmd bad state = 0
Jan  9 18:05:25 acer kernel: iwlwifi0: Failed to remove MAC context: -5
Jan  9 18:05:25 acer kernel: wlan0: Ethernet address: dc:41:a9:e6:7e:54
Jan  9 18:05:25 acer wpa_supplicant[1708]: Successfully initialized wpa_supplicant
Jan  9 18:05:25 acer wpa_supplicant[1708]: ioctl[SIOCS80211, op=20, val=0, arg_len=7]: Invalid argument
Jan  9 18:05:25 acer syslogd: last message repeated 1 times


wlan0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
	ether dc:41:a9:e6:7e:54
	groups: wlan
	ssid "" channel 1 (2412 MHz 11g)
	regdomain FCC country US authmode WPA1+WPA2/802.11i privacy MIXED
	deftxkey UNDEF txpower 30 bmiss 7 scanvalid 60 protmode CTS wme
	roaming MANUAL bintval 0
	parent interface: iwlwifi0
	media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet autoselect (autoselect)
	status: no carrier
	nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>

trying to connect to secure network "Noob" with password:

Jan 10 13:52:29 acer wpa_supplicant[1709]: wlan0: CTRL-EVENT-DSCP-POLICY clear_all
Jan 10 13:52:29 acer syslogd: last message repeated 1 times
Jan 10 13:52:29 acer wpa_supplicant[1709]: wlan0: CTRL-EVENT-TERMINATING 
Jan 10 13:52:29 acer kernel: iwlwifi0: iwl_trans_send_cmd bad state = 0
Jan 10 13:52:29 acer kernel: iwlwifi0: Failed to remove MAC context: -5
Jan 10 13:52:29 acer kernel: wlan0: Ethernet address: dc:41:a9:e6:7e:54
Jan 10 13:52:29 acer wpa_supplicant[5907]: Successfully initialized wpa_supplicant
Jan 10 13:52:29 acer wpa_supplicant[5907]: ioctl[SIOCS80211, op=20, val=0, arg_len=7]: Invalid argument
Jan 10 13:52:29 acer syslogd: last message repeated 1 times


wlan0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
	ether dc:41:a9:e6:7e:54
	inet 192.168.0.100 netmask 0xffffff00 broadcast 192.168.0.255
	groups: wlan
	ssid Noob channel 10 (2457 MHz 11g) bssid 18:d6:c7:36:23:06
	regdomain FCC country US authmode WPA2/802.11i privacy ON
	deftxkey UNDEF AES-CCM 2:128-bit txpower 30 bmiss 7 scanvalid 60
	protmode CTS wme roaming MANUAL
	parent interface: iwlwifi0
	media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet OFDM/36Mbps mode 11g
	status: associated
	nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
